name: Ryan Houben
summary: Software engineer with a strong focus on .NET back-ends and modern Angular front-ends. I build full-stack solutions from research through to production, and care about clean architecture, code quality, and reusable UI. Graduated in Computer Software Engineering, comfortable working in agile teams and collaborating closely with product and design.
